'''Whitecloak fighters''' were modified [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighters]] employed by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

They were painted [[Color/Legends|white]] by their pilots, lending to their nickname. The Whitecloaks were mostly phased out as the Jedi Order received dedicated starfighters like the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta 7]].

{{Ship-stub}}
